name: Vercel
description: Vercel provides serverless deployment, edge functions, and domain management for frontend and full-stack projects. The API lets you manage projects, deployments, domains, DNS records, environment variables, teams, Edge Configs, SSL certificates, webhooks, and authentication tokens.

capabilities.name: projects_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all projects in your Vercel account.

capabilities.name: projects_create
capabilities.description: Create a new Vercel project linked to a Git repository.

capabilities.name: projects_get
capabilities.description: Find a project by its ID or name.

capabilities.name: projects_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing project's settings.

capabilities.name: projects_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a project.

capabilities.name: deployments_list
capabilities.description: List deployments, optionally filtered by project.

capabilities.name: deployments_create
capabilities.description: Create a new deployment from a Git source or file uploads.

capabilities.name: deployments_get
capabilities.description: Get a deployment by ID or URL.

capabilities.name: deployments_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a deployment.

capabilities.name: deployments_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a deployment currently building.

capabilities.name: deployments_events_get
capabilities.description: Get build logs and events for a deployment.

capabilities.name: deployments_rollback
capabilities.description: Rollback all production domains to a previous deployment.

capabilities.name: deployments_promote
capabilities.description: Promote a deployment to production.

capabilities.name: domains_list
capabilities.description: List all domains in your Vercel account.

capabilities.name: domains_get
capabilities.description: Get information about a single domain.

capabilities.name: domains_add
capabilities.description: Add or transfer a domain to your Vercel account.

capabilities.name: domains_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a domain from your account.

capabilities.name: domains_config_get
capabilities.description: Get DNS configuration status for a domain.

capabilities.name: project_domains_list
capabilities.description: List all domains assigned to a project.

capabilities.name: project_domains_add
capabilities.description: Add a domain to a project.

capabilities.name: project_domains_verify
capabilities.description: Verify DNS configuration for a project domain.

capabilities.name: project_domains_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a domain from a project.

capabilities.name: env_vars_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all environment variables for a project.

capabilities.name: env_vars_create
capabilities.description: Create one or more environment variables for a project.

capabilities.name: env_vars_update
capabilities.description: Edit an existing environment variable.

capabilities.name: env_vars_delete
capabilities.description: Remove an environment variable from a project.

capabilities.name: dns_records_list
capabilities.description: List DNS records for a domain.

capabilities.name: dns_records_create
capabilities.description: Create a DNS record for a domain.

capabilities.name: dns_records_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a DNS record.

capabilities.name: teams_list
capabilities.description: List all teams the authenticated user belongs to.

capabilities.name: teams_get
capabilities.description: Get information about a specific team.

capabilities.name: teams_create
capabilities.description: Create a new team.

capabilities.name: teams_members_list
capabilities.description: List all members of a team.

capabilities.name: teams_invite_user
capabilities.description: Invite a user to a team.

capabilities.name: user_get
capabilities.description: Get the authenticated user's profile.

capabilities.name: aliases_list
capabilities.description: List all aliases.

capabilities.name: aliases_assign
capabilities.description: Assign an alias to a deployment.

capabilities.name: aliases_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an alias.

capabilities.name: certs_get
capabilities.description: Get SSL certificate details.

capabilities.name: certs_issue
capabilities.description: Issue a new SSL certificate.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all webhooks.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook for deployment events.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook.

capabilities.name: edge_configs_list
capabilities.description: List all Edge Configs.

capabilities.name: edge_configs_create
capabilities.description: Create a new Edge Config for key-value data at the edge.

capabilities.name: edge_config_items_list
capabilities.description: Get all items in an Edge Config.

capabilities.name: edge_config_items_update
capabilities.description: Batch update Edge Config items.

capabilities.name: auth_tokens_list
capabilities.description: List all authentication tokens.

capabilities.name: auth_tokens_create
capabilities.description: Create a new authentication token.

capabilities.name: auth_tokens_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an authentication token.
